title: telis occulta
intro: Telis occulta, also known as the "Night-blooming Jasmine", is a flowering plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. Its health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Telis occulta can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers are also used to make a fragrant essential oil with calming and sedative properties.
